title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 30.210 - Treasurer to have access to books of other offices
text:
30.210.  Treasurer to have access to books of other offices. — The state treasurer shall have free access to all other offices of this state, for the inspection of such books, accounts and papers as concern any of his duties.
(RSMo 1939 § 13057, A.L. 1945 p. 1977 § 23, A. 1949 S.B. 1013) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11433; 1919 § 13339; 1909 § 11840
